assault.escalade_vs_fresh_repulsed: Fresh garrison with cover advantage holds wall against unsupported escalade; historical norm
assault.breach_vs_fresh_contested: Fresh garrison can hold a breach with reserves; contested is historically correct for early-breach assaults
